title: Jeff Bezos's Prometheus raises $12B to build an 'artificial general engineer' for the physical world
SpaceX officially prices shares at $135 in the largest IPO ever
Google DeepMind is worried about what happens when millions of agents start to interact
Theker just raised $85M to build the factory robot that doesn't specialize in anything
These are the countries moving to ban social media for children
Jeff Bezos's Prometheus raises $12B to build an 'artificial general engineer' for the physical world
why_matters: At $41B, this is one of the largest private AI bets ever — targeting the physical-world engineering work that pure software AI hasn't yet touched.

title: SpaceX officially prices shares at $135 in the largest IPO ever
why_matters: The world's biggest IPO ever sets a new ceiling for what public markets will fund for deep-tech, capital-intensive ventures — rewriting what an ambitious technology company can be worth.

title: Google DeepMind is worried about what happens when millions of agents start to interact
why_matters: The window to do foundational safety research on multi-agent systems is measured in months, not years — and no such research field yet exists.

title: Theker just raised $85M to build the factory robot that doesn't specialize in anything
why_matters: A reconfigurable robot that adapts to different tasks without retraining could unlock automation for the 'messy middle' of factory work that specialized or humanoid robots haven't reached.

title: These are the countries moving to ban social media for children
why_matters: A coordinated global regulatory wave is forcing social media platforms to build age-verification infrastructure at scale — a new design and compliance constraint for every consumer app targeting young users.
